meta.headline: Professional Landscaping In Central Texas
meta.subhead: From clean installs to reliable upkeep. Built to look sharp today and hold up for years.

services.title: Shrub & Tree Installations
services.summary: Right plant, right place, planted correctly. We focus on spacing, depth, and a finished bed that looks intentional.
included: Plant selection guidance for sun, soil, and growth
Proper install, staking, and initial shaping

services.title: Garden Beds & Planting
services.summary: New beds, refreshes, and seasonal color. Crisp edges, clean mulch lines, and plants that thrive in the Texas heat.

services.title: Walkways, Pavers & Flagstones
services.summary: Hardscape that feels premium underfoot. We build proper base, compaction, and drainage so it stays level and solid.
included: Base prep, leveling, and drainage planning

services.title: Lawn & Turf Services
services.summary: Turf installs and repairs for a cleaner, fuller lawn. Focused on grading, soil, and results that actually last.

services.title: Soil & Mulching
services.summary: Fresh mulch and healthy soil make everything else look better. We deliver, spread, and leave a clean finish.
included: Weed barrier and erosion control options

services.title: Tree & Stump Services
services.summary: Safer, cleaner trees and a yard that feels open again. Trimming, removals, and stump solutions with full cleanup.

services.title: Fences & Decks
services.summary: Outdoor structures that match the property. Repairs or new installs with clean lines and solid materials.

services.title: Water Features & Lighting
services.summary: Add atmosphere and curb appeal. Low-voltage lighting and water features designed to look great at night.

services.title: Rock & Decorative Beds
services.summary: Low-maintenance, high-impact finishes: river rock, crushed granite, boulders, and decorative borders.

services.title: Property Maintenance & Cleanups
services.summary: Fast, thorough cleanups that make the whole property feel reset. Perfect for seasonal turnarounds and prep.
